channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Influencers are promoting peptides for better health. What does the science say?
item.description: The latest wellness craze involves injecting these molecules for athletic performance, longevity and more. Scientists say the research isn't keeping p...

item.title: As More Americans Embrace Anxiety Treatment, MAHA Derides Medications
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has criticized the broadening use of anxiety medications, claiming they’re harmful. Doctors and researchers say the MAHA movemen...

item.title: New Orleans Brings Back the House Call, Sending Nurses To Visit Newborns and Moms
item.description: Louisiana is one of the worst-performing states when it comes to health outcomes of mothers and infants. New Orleans is trying to catch health issues ...

item.title: Families call for increasing access to early diagnoses and interventions for autism
item.description: Families and autism experts say that the federal government could do a lot more to support autistic children by increasing access to early diagnosis a...

item.title: Looking for life purpose? Start with building social ties
item.description: Research shows that having a sense of purpose can lower stress levels and boost our mental health. Finding meaning may not have to be an ambitious pro...

item.title: PHOTOS: Your car has a lot to say about who you are
item.description: Photographer Martin Roemer visited 22 countries — from the U.S. to Senegal to India — to show how our identities are connected to our mode of transpor...

item.title: A huge study finds a link between cannabis use in teens and psychosis later
item.description: Researchers followed more than 400,000 teens until they were adults. It found that those who used marijuana were more likely to develop serious mental...

item.title: Journalists Explain Colorectal Cancer Risk and Federal Pullback on Georgia Disability Oversight
item.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national and local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

item.title: Trump’s Transparent Hospital Pricing Pays Off for Industry — But Not So Much for Patients
item.description: Get our weekly newsletter, The Week in Brief, featuring a roundup of our original coverage, Fridays at 2 p.m. ET.

item.title: State Lawmakers Seek Restraints on Wage Garnishment for Medical Debt
item.description: At least eight states are considering legislation to curtail wage garnishment over unpaid medical bills, as health care costs rise and more people bec...

item.title: Can We Ride the GenAI Wave Without Getting Subsumed by It?
item.description: By DAVID SHAYWITZ “There are decades where nothing happens; and there are weeks where decades happen,” said Lenin, probably never. It’s also a remarka...

item.title: Sofia Noori, Nema Health
item.description: Nema Health has cracked the code on PTSD and has an amazing study showing that their technique of intensive cognitive processing therapy is over 99% e...

item.title: AI replaces me: The Private AI Bubble Meets the Public Digital Health Reality Check

item.title: Amodei Believes “AI-Enabled Autocracy” Could Be Imminent

item.title: Ten Ten Ten – Trying to radically fix health care in the US
